name: Sales
description: Income from any normal business activity

name: Other Revenue
description: Any other income that does not relate to normal business

name: Accounts Receivable
description: Outstanding invoices owed to the business

name: Accounts Payable
description: Outstanding bills owed by the business

name: Cost of Goods Sold
description: Direct cost of ingredients and materials sold

name: Purchases
description: Goods and ingredients purchased for resale

name: Inventory
description: Value of tracked stock on hand

name: Prepayments
description: Payments made in advance of receiving goods

name: Sales Tax
description: Sales tax collected and owed to the tax authority
